title: OKAMIpack
description: OKAMIpack is a resourcepack made for fun (mostly orange and blue) texture and model changes, but also to improve upon some assets such as the beacon and elytra.
body: - Not enough **orange** in your life? - Your **GUI** isn't **dark** like your soul and lacks **pizza**? - **Elytra** looks like a gray blanket and the **beacon** isn't cool enough? ### Well you've come to the right place! This is **OKAMIpack**. A resourcepack which aims to change the **boring into exciting**. # What Does It Change? OKAMIpack changes a variety of assets ranging from the GUI to items. The pack changes the textures which can be broken down to: ## Utilities - Elytra - Bow & Crossbow (including arrows) - Golden Apple - Totem ![Utilites](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1a4871feac413008c85fd275fcb5d6e0d9562907.png) ## Blocks - **New Beacon** model - Rewamped **Diamond** and **Netherite** blocks ![Blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d3357cb20d4e483335b96441f09f705775570872.png) ## Armour & Tool Sets - All **Diamond** tools and armour - All **Netherite** tools and armour ![Armours](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0b2d79362426a1b65bb0f610cd7bd434bc20d774.png) ## GUI - Dark theme **Inventory** - Hotbar with **orange hearts**, **pizza** and an **orange XP bar** ![Inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/671c324f39462f921484cc9bc823c2bb257b0120.png) ![Hotbar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0e826c6d5efcc9d55359d79581f1c609654ef06b.png) ## Mobs - **River otter** (cyan axolotl) - **Okami** (snow fox) ![Mobs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7419bdeb55ed5a1956ee20ba765704c216dd4004.png) # Developer Notes This project has been abandoned due to many developments in the studio. But all is not lost, OKAMIpack will continue as a new resource pack which will be found under Dark Forge Studio. Thank you for your patience! # Links ![Website](https://okamicrafts.net/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/Website-Button.png)
